TestCase z32Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_p1 = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_p1, t1.p1, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.p1 = follow_case_p1;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Find maximum absolute value in the array
    double max_abs = 0.0;
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        double val = follow_case.p1[i] >= 0 ? follow_case.p1[i] : -follow_case.p1[i];
        if (val > max_abs) {
            max_abs = val;
        }
    }
    
    // Avoid division by zero
    if (max_abs == 0.0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Normalize each element by the maximum absolute value
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        follow_case.p1[i] /= max_abs;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
